framework.name: Agent Transaction Transparency and Explainability Requirements
framework.description: Ethical agent payment systems should provide traceability and reasoning for financial decisions. Users should be able to audit why an agent made a particular purchase (e.g., 'Service X was due for renewal and within budget'). Required for trust, compliance, and fiduciary responsibilities in sensitive contexts like healthcare payments or investing.
framework.raw_quote: An ethical agent payment system should be transparent. Users should be able to find out why the agent made a particular purchase or payment... This traceability helps ensure the agent is acting in the user's interest and allows auditing for any missteps.

source.title: Enabling Autonomous AI Agents to Make Payments - LinkedIn
